FAQ

Buying content

It is. Content-X-Labs sources a large volume of our content from partner site allrites - an experienced global content marketplace with thousands of licensed content from leading global studios and independent content creators. All content is cleared for Ai licensing and independently verified for ownership.

We will work with you to create the best delivery solution to effectively match your requirements, taking into account location, volume and timings amongst others. Primarily this will involve creating a dedicated space, for you to grab your files but we support shipping hard drives, carrier pigeon, and anything else our team and you can come up with

Content-X-Labs has thousands of hours of high-quality, diverse content available to match your dataset requirements - from b-roll to blockbusters. Content is primarily in 15mbps and above in mp4 format with supporting metadata if required.

This is the simplest question of all. Let us know a little about you, here. A member of the team will then be in contact to discuss requirements and create a package asap. We aim to get buyers up and running in the shortest time possible, with an easy and transparent onboarding process. What are you waiting for? Go.

Selling content

Content delivery is our forte, with a dedicated well equipped team ready to make the process fast and hassle free. We will work with you once signed up to create the best delivery framework - primarily this will involve uploading to a dedicated space, but we support shipping hard drives, carrier pigeon, and anything else our team and you can come up with.

LLM (Large Language Models) require significant content to train their AI software - improving the output and accuracy of the products they bring to market.

Content sold to AI Partners are solely used for training purposes, not reproduction or new content creation. And thats it.

We have strict terms in place with our Network of partners to ensure correct usage under contract.

As long as its 'HD' (ideally 1080p / 15mbps and above) - and you own the footage - then yes and this includes raw footage, animation & b-roll of any length (the longer and the higher quality the more revenue can be earned).

Our team can also help you with the editing / upscaling stage should you have footage you think may be suitable but needs amends before submission.

In short, yes. Our AI partner network is licensing millions of hours of content. You will get paid each and every time your content is sold to our network partners. Thousands of hours of high quality content can easily demand significant financial returns.
